content_blocks.text:
We covered a lot of ground, and you’re almost finished with this book. We’11 miss you, but before 
we let you go, we wouldn’t feel right about sending you out into JavaLand without a little more 
preparation. We can’t possibly fit everything you’11 need to know into this relatively small appendix. 
Actually, we did originally include everything you need to know about Java (not already covered by 
the other chapters), by reducing the type point size to .00003. It all fit, but nobody could read it. 50, 
we threw most of it away, but kept the best bits for this Top Ten appendix. 
This really is the end of the book. Except for the index (a must-read!).
Appendix 8
The Top Ten Topics that almost made it into the Real Book...
You mean, there’5 still 
MORE? Doesn’t this 
book EVER end?
659
this is a new appendix

We covered a lot of ground, and you’re almost finished with this book. We’11 miss you, but before 
we let you go, we wouldn’t feel right about sending you out into JavaLand without a little more 
preparation. We can’t possibly fit everything you’11 need to know into this relatively small appendix. 
Actually, we did originally include everything you need to know about Java (not already covered by 
the other chapters), by reducing the type point size to .00003. It all fit, but nobody could read it. 50, 
we threw most of it away, but kept the best bits for this Top Ten appendix. 
This really is the end of the book. Except for the index (a must-read!).
